season_weather: 真夏。猛暑。夏祭り・花火大会シーズン。半袖・ワンピース・サンダル
casual_outfit: Floral sundress, denim jacket, white canvas slip-ons, oversized tote bag, dainty gold necklace.
room_wear: oversized white graphic T-shirt, light gray cotton biker shorts
pajamas: white oversized sleep T-shirt with small cartoon cat print, matching pastel shorts
room_base: Tokyo 6-tatami one-room apartment. White bed cover, natural wood bed frame. White desk near the window with a MacBook Air M2 in Starlight. Beige lace curtains. White walls with a few postcards pinned. Warm-colored table lamp.
room_clutter: small stuffed animal sitting at the corner of the bed
room_seasonal: a small electric fan on the shelf, an iced drink sweating on the desk, a wind chime

afternoon.label: 講義2コマ
afternoon.scene: university classroom or campus corridor after two lectures
afternoon.story_scene: campus cafeteria during lunch break between lectures, phone on table

evening.label: バイト
evening.scene: leaving the cafe after work shift, tired but cute on the way home
